overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person journey through a mountain river valley. The player swims through a river, exits onto a rocky shore, ascends through grassy terrain, and encounters bighorn sheep grazing in an alpine meadow with snow-capped peaks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain river canyon with steep rocky walls

agents.ego_description: wading through chest-deep river water moving toward the rocky shoreline ahead

entered.detail: steep gray rock face rising directly from the water
tall rocky outcrop with scattered pine trees
distant mountain range with white snow visible on peaks
clear greenish water with visible ripples and reflections
tall evergreen trees lining the riverbank

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view swimming through a mountain river canyon. Steep rocky cliffs rise on both sides while snow-capped peaks are visible in the distance. The water is clear with gentle ripples, and pine trees line the banks ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain slope with mixed grass and rock

events.description: exits the river and begins ascending the rocky grassy shoreline

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the water and walking up the steep grassy slope with scattered rocks

entered.detail: steep incline covered with green grass and patches of dirt
large deciduous tree with spreading branches providing shade

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the water and ascends a steep grassy slope dotted with large rocks. An oak tree provides partial shade as the path climbs higher, with the river now behind and the rocky cliffs receding into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open alpine valley floor with scattered boulders

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy valley between rocky cliff walls

entered.detail: large gray boulders scattered across the valley floor
dense tree line at the far end of the valley

segments.scene_description: Moving through a wide open alpine valley, the camera passes scattered boulders and patches of tall grass. The rocky cliffs frame both sides of the valley while snow-capped mountains remain visible ahead beyond the distant tree line.

events.description: discovers a group of bighorn sheep grazing in the meadow ahead

agents.ego_description: slowly approaching and observing the bighorn sheep grazing peacefully in the meadow

notable_agents.action: bighorn sheep with curved horns grazing on grass and moving slowly through the meadow

segments.scene_description: The camera slows as it approaches a group of bighorn sheep grazing in the mountain meadow. The animals are calm and continue feeding as the observer approaches, with the rocky valley walls and distant snow-capped peaks providing a dramatic backdrop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that begins in a narrow river canyon and ascends into a wide, open alpine meadow. It begins by swimming through clear, rippling water between steep rocky cliffs, with snow-capped peaks visible in the far distance. As the camera exits the river, the perspective climbs a steep grassy slope dotted with large rocks and shaded by an oak tree, leaving the water behind. The scene then expands into a broad valley of scattered boulders and tall grass, framed by receding cliffs and a distant tree line. Finally, the movement slows as it approaches a group of calm bighorn sheep grazing in the meadow against the dramatic backdrop of the snowy mountains.
